skills.name: handler-development

skills.description: Create reusable ColdBox modules with proper structure, configuration, and integration patterns

skills.name: interceptor-development
skills.description: Build ColdBox interceptors for cross-cutting concerns, event listening, and aspect-oriented programming

skills.name: routing-development
skills.description: Configure ColdBox routes, RESTful resources, route groups, and advanced routing patterns

skills.name: event-model
skills.description: Master the ColdBox request context object for handling requests, responses, and application flow control

skills.name: view-rendering
skills.description: Advanced view rendering techniques including partials, caching, helpers, and dynamic content generation

skills.name: layout-development
skills.description: Create and manage ColdBox layouts and views with proper rendering, helpers, and dynamic content

skills.name: cache-integration
skills.description: Implement caching strategies using CacheBox for improved application performance and scalability

skills.name: boxlang-syntax
skills.description: Master BoxLang syntax including class definitions, properties, methods, and modern language features

skills.name: boxlang-classes
skills.description: Design and implement BoxLang classes with proper structure, inheritance, interfaces, and design patterns

skills.name: boxlang-functions
skills.description: Master BoxLang function types, parameters, return types, closures, and functional programming patterns

skills.name: boxlang-lambdas
skills.description: Master lambda expressions, arrow functions, and functional programming with BoxLang closures

skills.name: boxlang-modules
skills.description: Master BoxLang module system including imports, exports, module structure, and namespace management

skills.name: boxlang-streams
skills.description: Master BoxLang Stream API for functional-style data processing with lazy evaluation, filtering, mapping, and collection operations

skills.name: boxlang-types
skills.description: Master BoxLang type system including type hints, type checking, type coercion, and strong typing for robust code

skills.name: boxlang-interop
skills.description: Master BoxLang interoperability with CFML, Java integration, calling Java classes, and seamless type conversions

skills.name: testing-bdd
skills.description: Practical guide to TestBox BDD workflows, including spec structure, readable scenario naming, expectation style, setup/teardown patterns, and maintainable behavior-focused tests.

skills.name: testing-unit
skills.description: Comprehensive guide to writing unit tests with TestBox, including test organization, assertions, expectations, data providers, and testing best practices for isolated component testing

skills.name: testing-integration
skills.description: Comprehensive guide to integration testing in ColdBox applications, including database integration, API testing, external service integration, and full-stack testing strategies

skills.name: testing-handler
skills.description: Comprehensive guide to testing ColdBox event handlers, including request context mocking, event execution, HTTP method testing, and validation testing for controllers

skills.name: testing-mocking
skills.description: Complete guide to mocking dependencies in tests using MockBox, including creating mocks, stubs, spies, and verification patterns

skills.name: testing-fixtures
skills.description: Comprehensive guide to test data management including fixtures, factories, seeders, and data builders for consistent and maintainable test data

skills.name: testing-coverage
skills.description: Complete guide to code coverage analysis in CFML/BoxLang applications, including coverage metrics, reporting, CI integration, and improving test coverage

skills.name: testing-ci
skills.description: Complete guide to setting up continuous integration for automated testing, build pipelines, deployment workflows, and CI best practices
